1.subtitle: Compassionate, certified caregivers providing tailored support for your loved ones — so they can live with dignity and comfort.

2.subtitle: Technology-enabled healthcare that keeps families informed and loved ones safe, every hour of every day.

3.subtitle: Our certified specialists work together to deliver seamless, personalised care plans built around each client's unique needs.

4.subtitle: Experienced professionals united by a commitment to elevating your standard of care through expertise, empathy, and attention to detail.

5.subtitle: We build lasting relationships and bring genuine warmth to every home we serve — because true care goes beyond the clinical.

6.subtitle: Meet the Swift Comfort Line team — uniformed, trained professionals who bring expert care and a warm, reassuring presence to every visit.

about.label: Who We Are
about.title: Compassionate Care You Can Count On
about.paragraph1: Swift Comfort Line was founded on a simple belief — that every person deserves to age with dignity, in the comfort of their own home, surrounded by the people and things they love. We bring that belief to life every day through our team of certified, compassionate caregivers.
about.paragraph2: We don't just provide services — we build relationships. From the first consultation to each daily visit, our team is dedicated to understanding your family's unique needs and delivering care that truly makes a difference.
about.quote: Care is not just what we do. It is who we are.
about.cardSub: We're ready to help your family
about.urgency: We respond to all inquiries within 2 hours. Same-day care arrangements available.

contact.hoursValue: 24 hours a day, 7 days a week

ourServices.label: What We Offer
ourServices.title: Caring Services, Tailored for You
ourServices.subtitle: We provide a full range of compassionate home care services designed to help your loved ones live independently, safely, and with dignity.
ourServices.ctaHeading: Let us build a care plan around your family's needs.

companionship.title: Companionship
companionship.description: Meaningful social connection that reduces isolation, lifts spirits, and keeps your loved one engaged in the things they enjoy every day.

errands.title: Errands & Shopping
errands.description: We handle everyday errands so your family member can stay comfortable at home without missing a single necessity.

mealPrep.title: Meal Preparation
mealPrep.description: Nutritious, home-cooked meals prepared fresh to accommodate dietary needs, preferences, and medical requirements.

housekeeping.title: Light Housekeeping
housekeeping.description: A clean, safe living environment maintained with care so your loved one can relax in comfort and dignity at home.

transportation.title: Transportation
transportation.description: Safe, reliable transport to medical appointments, social activities, and anywhere else life takes your loved one.

respite.title: Respite Support
respite.description: Temporary relief for family caregivers — giving you peace of mind and the rest you deserve while your loved one is in trusted hands.

packages.label: Care Plans
packages.title: Simple, Flexible Packages
packages.note: All plans include a personalised care assessment at no extra charge. No lock-in contracts.

serviceAreas.label: Where We Work
serviceAreas.title: Proudly Serving Families Nationwide
serviceAreas.boundary: No matter where you call home, Swift Comfort Line is here to help. We provide compassionate care services to families right across Canada.
serviceAreas.canadaSub: Coast to coast, we're here for you
serviceAreas.footnote: Have questions about service in your specific city or region? Reach out and we'll confirm availability right away.

testimonials.label: Client Stories
testimonials.title: Trusted by Families Across Canada
testimonials.subtitle: Don't just take our word for it — hear directly from the families and clients we've had the privilege of caring for.
testimonials.ctaText: Join 200+ families who trust Swift Comfort Line with the care of their loved ones.

1.text: Swift Comfort Line has been an absolute blessing for my mother. The caregivers are not just professional — they genuinely care. I finally have peace of mind knowing she's in good hands.
1.name: Margaret O'Connell

2.text: After my father's stroke, we needed reliable support fast. The team arranged everything within 48 hours and the quality of care has been exceptional ever since.
2.name: David Chen

3.text: I was nervous about having someone help me at home, but my caregiver treats me with so much respect and warmth. It doesn't feel like a service — it feels like family.
3.name: Patricia Williams

4.text: The transportation and errand support has given my father back his independence. He can get to his appointments and the grocery store without relying on us every time.
4.name: Robert Singh

5.text: What stood out most was the communication. We always knew what was happening with my mother's care, and the team adjusted the plan whenever her needs changed.
5.name: Linda Tremblay

6.text: Living alone after my wife passed was hard. My companion caregiver visits twice a week and those visits have genuinely improved my mood and outlook on life.
6.name: James Okafor

7.text: The respite care let me take a real vacation for the first time in three years without worrying about my mother. The caregiver was attentive, kind, and incredibly thorough.
7.name: Susan Bergeron

8.text: From the first phone call to the ongoing care, everything has been handled with professionalism and heart. I recommend Swift Comfort Line to every family I know.
8.name: Michael Patel

contact.label: Get In Touch
contact.title: Let's Talk About Your Family's Care
contact.subtitle: Reach out today for a free, no-obligation consultation. We'll listen to your needs and build a care plan that's right for your family.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us a little about your care needs...
contact.privacyNote: Your information is kept confidential and is never shared with third parties.
contact.successText: Thank you for reaching out. A member of our care team will contact you within 2 hours.
contact.swalSuccessText: Thank you! We will get back to you shortly.

footer.description: Reliable senior support in Ottawa. Transportation, errands, and weekly home visits from a trusted companion.
footer.address: 1338 Wellington St West, Unit 10, Ottawa, Ontario, K1Y 3B7 Canada.
